title: Kanban Mouse Event
description: Represents the payload for Kanban item mouse interactions (click, double-click, right-click, action click).

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: AXKanbanMouseEvent extends NXNativeEvent and carries the original item data and native event.

props.name: sender
props.description: The Kanban component instance that emitted the event. Inherited from NXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native mouse event that triggered the interaction. Inherited from NXNativeEvent.

props.name: item
props.description: The original data object for the clicked item.
